name: apex-contracts
description: APEX (Agent Payment Exchange) Protocol - Smart Contracts

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test test/AgenticCommerce.test.ts test/EvaluatorRouter.test.ts test/OptimisticPolicy.test.ts test/Upgrades.test.ts test/RouterPolicyLifecycle.test.ts
scripts.deploy:commerce:testnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.testnet npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-commerce.ts --network bscTestnet
scripts.deploy:router:testnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.testnet npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-router.ts --network bscTestnet
scripts.deploy:policy:testnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.testnet npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-policy.ts --network bscTestnet
scripts.upgrade:commerce:testnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.testnet npx hardhat run scripts/upgrade-commerce.ts --network bscTestnet
scripts.rotate-admin:testnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.testnet npx hardhat run scripts/rotate-admin.ts --network bscTestnet
scripts.deploy:timelock:mainnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.mainnet npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-timelock.ts --network bsc
scripts.deploy:commerce:mainnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.mainnet npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-commerce.ts --network bsc
scripts.deploy:router:mainnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.mainnet npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-router.ts --network bsc
scripts.deploy:policy:mainnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.mainnet npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-policy.ts --network bsc
scripts.upgrade:commerce:mainnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.mainnet npx hardhat run scripts/upgrade-commerce.ts --network bsc
scripts.rotate-admin:mainnet: DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.mainnet npx hardhat run scripts/rotate-admin.ts --network bsc
